channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Unlocking science: building AI researchers can trust
item.description: Over half of researchers now say they use AI tools in their work, but only two in ten believe generic AI tools are trustworthy.

item.title: Microsoft's Xbox mode starts making its way to Windows 11 PCs
item.description: Xbox mode brings a console-like interface to Windows 11.

item.title: What Chef Jon Kung Swears By in the Kitchen (2026)
item.description: Plus, their definitive takes on sharpening knives and washing rice.

item.title: Dyson finally made a better robot, but a worse vacuum
item.description: I'm deeply conflicted about the Dyson Spot + Scrub Ai robot vacuum and mop. It's the company's best robotic floor cleaner to date, with excellent mopping performance, good navigation and obstacle detection, and a multifunction dock that takes much of the busywork off your hands. But Dyson's first attempt at a vacuum-and-mop combo is a […]

item.title: Dyson put someone else’s motor in its robot vacuum
item.description: Dyson, a company built on engineering high-speed motors, has confirmed to The Verge that its newest robot vacuum doesn't use a Dyson motor. The recently launched Spot & Scrub Ai robot vacuum and mop was "co-engineered," Nathan Lawson McLean, senior design manager at Dyson, told The Verge. According to Lawson McLean, the device merges "new […]

item.title: How to watch UCI Mountain Bike World Series 2026: Live stream cycling online from anywhere
item.description: All the ways to watch UCI Mountain Bike World Series 2026 live streams online and from anywhere, as Valentina Höll and Jackson Goldstone defend their crowns.

item.title: You heard right — NordVPN has rolled out an AI voice checker to protect you from audio deepfakes on Chrome
item.description: NordVPN has just launched a new feature for its Chrome extension, AI Voice Detector, that warns you if you are dealing with synthetic or human voices.

item.title: AI tools have made vulnerability exploitation faster and easier
item.description: “That world no longer exists”: AI has terminated the "grace period" for closing security vulnerabilities, here's what you need to know.

item.title: Toilet maker Toto is here to help with the RAM crisis
item.description: It's pledged to invest more into its division making ceramics used in the production of NAND memory.

item.title: Do You Need Aluminum Luggage? (2026): Rimowa, Away, Carl Friedrik
item.description: All-metal carry-ons give you the turn-left-on-a-plane look, but are they really worth the cost of a vacation?

item.title: Inside the design of Sabastian Sawe’s world-record-setting, 97-gram Adidas ‘supershoe’
item.description: Adidas’s head of innovation unpacks how a shoe that weighs less than a bar of soap helped break two world records at the London Marathon. When Kenya’s Sabastian Sawe crossed the finish line at the London Marathon on April 26, an Adidas attendant was waiting on the sidelines to collect his shoes. The attendant wrote Sawe’s record-breaking time, 1:59.30, on the side of the shoes, waited for him to take some photos with them, and then whisked them off to Adidas’s archives in Herzogenaurach, Germany....

item.title: Why governance is moving to the middleware layer
item.description: As hybrid systems expand, enterprises shift governance to middleware for visibility and control.

item.title: Adieu la corvée de ménage et du jardin : 4 innovations Dreame à prix cassé pour un foyer impeccable sans effort [Sponso]
item.description: Les French Days battent leur plein. À cette occasion, Dreame propose ses meilleurs appareils ménagers à prix cassé. On vous a sélectionné les 4 meilleures affaires à réaliser.

item.title: The Samsung Galaxy S27 Ultra is tipped to ditch its predecessor’s 3x telephoto camera, fueling rumors of an iPhone-style redesign
item.description: The Samsung Galaxy S27 Ultra could have only three rear lenses, down from the four rear lenses on the S26 Ultra.

item.title: When stability became strategy: the post-upgrade enterprise
item.description: Vendors set deadlines, analysts warn of falling behind, and the rhetoric is relentless – much of it built on a misconception about what security and compliance actually require.

item.title: 'The coming months are critical' — dev confirms Resonance: A Plague Tale Legacy's release is 'almost here'
item.description: Asobo Studio has provided a development update on Resonance: A Plague Tale Legacy, suggesting the game is months away from launch.

item.title: Top tech of the month: the best new gadgets we've tested for May 2026
item.description: Including a 'fantastic' OLED TV, and some five-star speakers that are 'crystal clear, fathoms deep and sound at least twice their size'.

item.title: 'Most AI in hiring today is making a bad system worse': Candidates are hitting back at employers using AI interviews - with many prepared to walk out
item.description: Nearly half of job seekers have now been interviewed by an AI - so how do we fight back?

item.title: Soundcore Nebula P1 Projector Review (2026): Compact and Portable for Indoor-Outdoor Viewing
item.description: This all-in-one indoor-outdoor projector from Anker is compact, affordable, and water-resistant—but not cinema quality.

item.title: Vous rechargez votre smartphone avec une batterie externe en avion ? Dans ce pays, vous risquez 2 ans de prison
item.description: Vous aviez l'habitude de recharger votre smartphone en plein vol grâce à votre batterie portable ? Si vous voyagez vers ou depuis le Japon, c'est désormais terminé. Depuis quelques jours, les batteries externes sont strictement encadrées. Toute infraction peut valoir jusqu'à deux ans de prison…

item.title: J’ai traversé la France en Citroën ë-C5 Aircross en seulement 2 arrêts et voici comment j’ai fait
item.description: On entend tout et son contraire concernant les voitures électriques. Mais si un discours revient régulièrement, c’est qu’elles ne sont pas faites pour les longs trajets. Vraiment ? J’ai traversé la France au volant du Citroën ë-C5 Aircross Grande Autonomie en seulement deux arrêts de recharge. Voici mon récit !

item.title: Companies obsessed with youth are missing their best hires. Here’s why
item.description: Younger workers don’t have a monopoly on innovation. 50% of the global population is ageist against older people, according to the World Health Organization. As the Managing Director of a recruitment company, I know this is true. Spend enough time listening in on hiring conversations, and a curious pattern emerges. When companies talk of innovation, adaptability, and fresh thinking, they often imagine a young, agile, fast-moving team with the latest technologies at their fingertips....

item.title: Design’s next era is about making people feel seen
item.description: Designer Alison Rand on turning adversity, anxiety, and ambiguity into a superpower. Alison Rand is a strategist, author, and design leader working at the intersection of design strategy, organizational structure, and operations. A former developer who helped build early UX practices at agencies like Huge and Hot Studio, she now consults with organizations to untangle complexity—how people work, how decisions travel, and how culture is shaped through structure. She is pursuing a master’s degree in Strategic Foresight at the University of Houston, co-founded Forty Fifty, a social health platfor...

item.title: We need a cybersecurity curriculum taught by hackers
item.description: The cybersecurity industry has spent years talking about a talent and skills shortage. Turns out the talent and skills exist. It's just being recruited by the other side.

item.title: This Treatment Could Reverse Osteoarthritis Joint Damage With a Single Injection
item.description: Osteoarthritis has no cure, but researchers have developed new therapies that help aging or damaged joints repair themselves in a matter of weeks.

item.title: Pour les French Days 2026, le pack avec une Samsung Galaxy Watch 8 Classic et une batterie externe 10 000 mAh est bradé à -130 €
item.description: Si vous cherchez une bonne montre connectée, la Samsung Galaxy Watch 8 Classic, notée 8/10, dans un pack avec une batterie externe est en promo à 399,99 euros au lieu de 529,99 euros chez Boulanger.

item.title: 'Organizations need to stop workarounds and regain control': Report finds many firms don't know what their workers are sharing with AI tools
item.description: Workers are using unapproved AI, while AI agents amplify visibility issues by accessing and sharing the wrong data.
